text:
Created attachment 143660
mikutter

- Update to 3.0.0

Tested by myself.

Under DEFAULT_VERSIONS= ruby=2.1 environment, massive following warning is 
displayed because of rubygem-gettext. mikutter properly works but it's time
to consider updating rubygem-gettext.

$ mikutter
poperser.ry:249: warning: IO#lines is deprecated; use #each_line instead
poperser.ry:249: warning: IO#lines is deprecated; use #each_line instead
poperser.ry:249: warning: IO#lines is deprecated; use #each_line instead
poperser.ry:249: warning: IO#lines is deprecated; use #each_line instead
